LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT HERLINDA HERNANDEZ' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PLAINTIFF HAS PLEADED A BASIS TO EVICT THE FORMER OWNER, BUT THE MOVING PARTY. DEFENDANT IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(C). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
HERLINDA HERNANDEZ, 415-467-7413, defendant and moving party appearing propria persona
Robert Cohen, Esq. 800-492-2657 for plaintiff and opposing party OWB Reo

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT HERLINDA HERNANDEZ' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE MOVING DEFENDANT WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD A BASIS ON WHICH TO EVICT THIS DEFENDANT. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina, CSR # 9956 301/PJB
